meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for oracle — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load all cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep pattern. On hit, read full DB entry via read_file(card.ref, startLine=card.lines[0], endLine=card.lines[1]).

cards.title: 1. CheckUpkeep/PerformUpkeep Mismatch
cards.detect: `checkUpkeep` returns data encoded in one format, but `performUpkeep` expects a different format.

cards.title: 2. Gas Limit Issues
cards.detect: `performUpkeep` contains unbounded loops, multiple external calls, or complex operations that can...

cards.title: 3. Unbounded Operations
cards.detect: All logs in block must be processed

cards.title: 4. Callback Safety
cards.detect: Strict requirements can cause repeated failures

cards.title: 5. Authentication Missing
cards.detect: Functions source code contains hardcoded API endpoints without authentication, making them publicly...

cards.title: 6. Response Validation
cards.detect: Blindly trusts response
